sections.paragraph:
m. χλωρότης, ὠχρότης-

(1) of persons, paleness of face; that lurid greenish colour in the countenance of men when smitten with great terror, Jer 30:6.

(2) of grain, yellowness, paleness, mildew, Deu 28:22 1Ki 8:37 Amo 4:9. (Arab. يَرْقَانُ id.)

[“יָרְקְעָם (“paleness of the people?”), Jorkeam, pr.n. of a town of Judæa, 1Ch 2:44.”]
